backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the accident documentation app, defining data types (AccidentReport, UserProfile, etc.) and implementing canister methods for user profile management, photo upload, and accident report storage with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three fault reference tool features (dedicated page, scenario selector UI, and professional visual theme) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the build plan describing what each component, page, hook, and utility does.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes (/, /reports, /reports/$reportId, /fault-reference) and wraps the app in a QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/AccidentReportFo: Accident report creation form collecting vehicle info, incident details, surroundings, and photos, then submitting via the useCreateReport mutation and navigating to the new report's detail page.
frontend/src/components/ContributoryNegl: Collapsible panel displaying UK contributory negligence framework, including fault-split scenario cards with visual percentage bars and legal precedent cards sourced from negligenceData.
frontend/src/components/DiscrepancyAlert: Renders a destructive alert when a red-light violation discrepancy is detected between witness testimony and AI-detected traffic signal state, prompting adjuster review.
frontend/src/components/FaultMatrixPanel: Collapsible panel showing an insurer fault matrix with Party A/B fault percentages for multiple scenarios, highlighting the active scenario based on the provided violation type.
frontend/src/components/FaultReferenceDi: Displays scenario-specific legal references including Highway Code rules, Road Traffic Act sections, and case law entries alongside fault percentage bars for two parties.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root application layout with a sticky header containing navigation buttons for New Report, My Reports, and Fault Reference pages, plus a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/LegalReferencePa: Collapsible panel that aggregates and displays Highway Code rules, Road Traffic Act 1988 sections, and case law entries relevant to the provided list of violations.
frontend/src/components/LiabilityDisplay: Renders a visual liability assessment card showing percentage fault split between two parties using color-coded progress bars and labeled breakdowns. Displays a pending state when liability data is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/NextStepsPanel.t: Collapsible panel that displays categorized post-accident guidance (immediate actions, reporting, claims, legal options, contacts) using an accordion layout driven by static nextStepsData.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Displays a grid of uploaded accident photos with lazy-loaded thumbnails and a navigable lightbox dialog for full-size viewing, converting raw Uint8Array image data into blob URLs.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: Photo upload component that accepts JPEG/PNG/WebP files up to a configurable maximum, converts them to ExternalBlob instances, shows previews in a grid, and notifies the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/components/ReportDetail.tsx: Full detail view for a single accident report, composing liability, violations, legal references, contributory negligence, fault matrix, photo gallery, and next-steps panels into a structured page layout.
frontend/src/components/ReportList.tsx: Displays a sorted list of accident reports with thumbnails, fault badges, vehicle info, and timestamps, with loading/empty/error states and navigation to individual report pages.
frontend/src/components/ScenarioSelector: Renders a grid of selectable accident scenario cards with icons and descriptions, highlighting the currently selected scenario and emitting changes via an onChange callback.
frontend/src/components/SpeedDisplay.tsx: Displays calculated vehicle velocity in both m/s and mph with color-coded styling and a speed label derived from utility functions.
frontend/src/components/TrafficSignsDisp: Renders a list of detected traffic signs with type-based icons, position info, timestamps, and simulated confidence badges.
frontend/src/components/ViolationsDispla: Shows detected traffic violations in styled cards with type-specific icons and timestamps, or a green no-violations state if the list is empty.
frontend/src/data/faultMatrix.ts: Defines a static insurer-style fault matrix mapping common road incident scenarios to fault percentages, contributing factors, rationale, and related violation types.
frontend/src/data/legalReferences.ts: Provides a static mapping of traffic violation types to UK legal references including Highway Code rules, Road Traffic Act 1988 sections, and relevant case law entries.
frontend/src/data/negligenceData.ts: Defines static UK contributory negligence framework data including fault-split scenarios (e.g. rear-end, red light) with percentage splits and legal precedents like Froom v Butcher.
frontend/src/data/nextSteps.ts: Provides structured post-incident guidance data organised into categories (immediate actions, reporting obligations, claims process) with legal references to the Road Traffic Act 1988.
frontend/src/data/scenarioReferences.ts: Maps seven common accident scenario types (rear-end, red light, lane change, etc.) to their relevant Highway Code rules, RTA 1988 sections, and case law for a Fault Reference Tool.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on accident reports and user profiles against the ICP backend actor, including report creation with photo metadata and traffic sign detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useVelocityCalculatio: Simple hook that computes velocity in m/s and mph from distance and time inputs using memoised calculations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties (design tokens) for light and dark themes, including special tokens for the Fault Reference Tool.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/FaultReferencePage.ts: Page component for the Fault Reference Tool that renders a scenario selector and conditionally displays a fault assessment with Highway Code rules, RTA 1988 sections, and case law based on the selected scenario.
frontend/src/pages/NewReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders the AccidentReportForm for creating a new accident report.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that fetches and displays a single accident report by ID from URL params, showing loading skeletons or an error state as appropriate.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Page component that renders the ReportList component for viewing and managing all saved accident reports.
frontend/src/utils/speedColorCoding.ts: Utility functions that return Tailwind color class strings and human-readable labels based on speed thresholds (low/medium/high).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps oklch CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts and sidebar/fault-reference colors, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the app's summary, architectural notes, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests (fault reference tool, bird's eye grid view, injury photo upload, etc.).
